description: Ground-truth evaluation dataset for all three Riverty RAG modes. All content read directly from the actual PDF files.

pages.1: Full GDPR (EU 2016/679) — encryption, access control, data subject rights: access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability
pages.2: TERMINATION — Either party, 15 days written notice, no cause required
pages.3: LIABILITY — Capped at total fees in preceding 12 months, no indirect/incidental/consequential

pages.1: DATA USAGE only — no GDPR, no EU 2016/679 mention, no explicit data protection obligations
pages.2: TERMINATION WEAK — only under exceptional circumstances at Service Provider sole discretion, no guaranteed termination rights for Client
pages.3: LIABILITY — Capped at total fees in preceding 12 months, no indirect/incidental/consequential

pages.1: Full GDPR (EU 2016/679) — encryption, access control, data subject rights
pages.2: TERMINATION — Either party, 15 days written notice, no cause required
pages.3: LIABILITY UNLIMITED — Service Provider assumes full and unlimited liability including direct, indirect, incidental, consequential

pages.1: Full GDPR (EU 2016/679) — encryption, access control, data subject rights
pages.2: TERMINATION WEAK — only under exceptional circumstances at Service Provider sole discretion, no guaranteed termination rights for Client
pages.3: LIABILITY — Capped at total fees in preceding 12 months, no indirect/incidental/consequential

pages.1: DATA USAGE only — no GDPR, no EU 2016/679, no explicit data protection obligations
pages.2: TERMINATION WEAK — only under exceptional circumstances at Service Provider sole discretion, no guaranteed termination rights for Client
pages.3: LIABILITY UNLIMITED — Service Provider assumes full and unlimited liability: direct, indirect, incidental, consequential

pages.1: Full GDPR (EU 2016/679) — encryption, access control, data subject rights
pages.2: TERMINATION — Either party, 15 days written notice, no cause required
pages.3: LIABILITY — Capped at total fees in preceding 12 months, no indirect/incidental/consequential

mode2_questions.question: Which contract is missing a GDPR compliance clause?
mode2_questions.description: find_missing: identify the one contract lacking GDPR. Relevant chunk is page 1 of contract_missing_gdpr.

mode2_questions.question: Which contract has unlimited liability?
mode2_questions.description: find_clause: identify the one contract with unlimited liability. Relevant chunk is page 3.

mode2_questions.question: Which contracts have a weak termination clause where the client has no guaranteed termination rights?
mode2_questions.description: find_missing: two contracts share weak termination. Both page 2s are relevant.

mode2_questions.question: How many days written notice is required to terminate the contract_gdpr_strict agreement?
mode2_questions.description: find_clause: specific numeric value from termination clause. Relevant chunk is page 2.

mode2_questions.question: What data subject rights are mentioned in the GDPR compliance clause?
mode2_questions.description: find_clause: GDPR rights appear in page 1 of the three contracts that have full GDPR.

mode2_questions.question: What is the governing law for all stored contracts?
mode2_questions.description: find_clause: governing law is page 4 of all contracts. Tests broad multi-doc retrieval.

mode2_questions.question: What is the liability cap in contracts that limit liability to 12 months of fees?
mode2_questions.description: find_clause: liability cap appears in page 3 of the 3 contracts with capped liability.

mode2_questions.question: Does the contract_missing_gdpr contract include any EU data protection obligations?
mode2_questions.description: find_missing: negative detection — confirm GDPR is absent in contract_missing_gdpr page 1.

mode2_questions.question: Which contracts allow either party to terminate with written notice without cause?
mode2_questions.description: find_clause: balanced termination rights appear in page 2 of two contracts.

mode2_questions.question: In the contract with unlimited liability, what specific types of damages is the Service Provider liable for?
mode2_questions.description: find_clause: damage types from the unlimited liability clause on page 3.

mode1_questions.question: Is this contract GDPR compliant?
mode1_questions.description: Mode 1 single-doc: temp_contract_1 has no GDPR. Answer must reflect absence.

mode1_questions.question: What does the liability clause say? Is the liability limited or unlimited?
mode1_questions.description: Mode 1 single-doc: temp_contract_1 has unlimited liability. Must identify this.

mode1_questions.question: Does the client have guaranteed termination rights in this contract?
mode1_questions.description: Mode 1 single-doc: temp_contract_1 has weak termination — client has no guaranteed rights.

mode1_questions.question: Does this contract comply with GDPR?
mode1_questions.description: Mode 1 single-doc: temp_contract_2 has full GDPR. Answer must confirm compliance.

mode1_questions.question: How many days notice is required to terminate this contract?
mode1_questions.description: Mode 1 single-doc: temp_contract_2 has 15-day termination notice.

mode3_questions.question: How does the data protection clause in this uploaded contract compare to the contracts in the database?
expected_comparison_points: database has contracts with full GDPR
mode3_questions.description: Mode 3 compare: temp_contract_1 (no GDPR) vs DB. Must note missing_gdpr is similar, others differ.

mode3_questions.question: Which database contracts have a similar liability clause to this uploaded contract?
mode3_questions.description: Mode 3 compare: temp_contract_1 has unlimited liability — only contract_unlimited_liability matches.

mode3_questions.question: How does the termination clause in this uploaded contract compare to the database contracts?
mode3_questions.description: Mode 3 compare: temp_contract_2 has 15-day termination — similar to gdpr_strict and unlimited_liability.

mode3_questions.question: How does the GDPR compliance in this uploaded contract compare to the database? Which stored contracts have similar data protection?
mode3_questions.description: Mode 3 compare: temp_contract_2 has full GDPR — similar to 3 of 4 DB contracts.
